name: io.github.Mike25app/scaleforge-mcp-meta-ads
description: Control Facebook & Instagram Ads via Meta Graph API v24.0. 32 tools, no backend required.

environmentVariables.name: META_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Meta Marketing API access token. Use a System User token from Business Manager for production (never expires), or a Graph API Explorer user token for quick testing (expires ~2h). Required scopes: ads_management, ads_read, business_management, pages_read_engagement, pages_manage_ads.
